description: A customer support chatbot based on a local LLM via Ollama and a web interface similar to Open WebUI.
reference_architecture: local LLM, Ollama, web UI, system prompt, internal knowledge base, conversation history, application logs
security_assumptions: no disclosure of personal data, confidential information, system prompt, irrelevant internal documents or logs

limitations: no direct access to files, databases, logs, model weights or admin configuration
